name: charms
description: Agent skills for video inspection, Codex quota checks, X/Twitter bookmarks, and ChatGPT Pro review.

interface.shortDescription: Local skills for video, quota, bookmarks, and review
interface.longDescription: Use Charms skills to inspect short videos, check Codex reset-credit status, fetch or digest X/Twitter bookmarks, and prepare scoped ChatGPT Pro review packets.
defaultPrompt: Use watch-video to inspect this video.
Use chatgpt-pro-review to review this implementation.
